# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
- type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  kind: "functionapp"
  identity:
    type: "SystemAssigned"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]"
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
      - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
        value: "[parameters('storageAccountConnectionString')]"
      - name: "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION"
        value: "~3"
      - name: "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME"
        value: "dotnet"
- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'storageRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Storage Blob Data Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'keyVaultRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Key Vault Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'sqlRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'SQL DB Contributor')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
  name: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'cosmosDbRoleAssignment')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'full').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Cosmos DB Account Reader Role')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
  hostingPlanName:
    type: string
  storageAccountConnectionString:
    type: securestring
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
